description: Perform a database archival operation using the Chinook database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_working.db. Archive all invoices and invoice_items from the years 2009 and 2010 into a new SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_archive.db using the same schema. Once archived, remove the 2009 and 2010 records from the working database while preserving data from 2011 onwards. In chinook_working.db, create a table named 'archived_yearly_summary' with columns Year (INTEGER), InvoiceCount (INTEGER), TotalRevenue (REAL), UniqueCustomers (INTEGER), and AvgInvoiceTotal (REAL) to store aggregated data for the archived years. Generate a reconciliation report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/archival_reconciliation.csv with columns Metric, OriginalCount, WorkingCount, ArchiveCount, and Status, including rows for 'total_invoices', 'total_invoice_items', 'revenue_2009', and 'revenue_2010' to verify data integrity.
